originalTitle: The volatile AI trade marched higher, but oil kept Wall Street on edge last week
summary: Chip stocks had a wild but strong week. Meta led our portfolio higher.
content: Chip stocks had a wild but strong week. Meta led our portfolio higher.
chineseTitle: 波动较大的 AI 交易走高，但上周油价让华尔街紧张不安
chineseSummary: 芯片股经历了疯狂但强劲的一周。 Meta 带领我们的投资组合走高。
chineseContent: 芯片股经历了疯狂但强劲的一周。 Meta 带领我们的投资组合走高。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
